items.claim: Robert Whittaker is a welterweight fighting at light heavyweight.
items.quote: he is a [ __ ] welterweight fighting at light heavyweight.

items.claim: Terrance McKinney gasses out by the second half of the first round.
items.quote: by the second half of the first round, he's already starting to gas out.

items.claim: Bobby Green has a handle on Terrance McKinney's wild style due to training together.
items.quote: that makes me think that Bobby Green kind of has a handle on Terrance McKinney's wild style, and they trained together, too.

items.claim: Terrance McKinney has a grappling advantage over Bobby Green.
items.quote: Terrance McKinney's a powerful, explosive kid. Could have a grappling advantage here.

items.claim: Loner Cavanaugh is difficult to wrestle or take down.
items.quote: He's going to be hard to wrestle with or take down.

items.claim: Brandon Royval is too sloppy on the feet.
items.quote: Brandon Royval's a little too sloppy.

items.claim: Mario Bautista is a competent striker with high volume.
items.quote: Pretty basic striker, but very effective and fights a nice high volume.

items.claim: Cory Sandhagen has a jiu-jitsu advantage over Mario Bautista.
items.quote: Cory Sandhagen has the jump flying knee. He's got good kickboxing and he's got the jiu-jitsu advantage, too.

items.claim: Benoit Saint Denis is sloppy on the feet.
items.quote: Benoit Saint Denis is a little sloppy on the feet, though.

items.claim: Paddy Pimblett has a serious jiu-jitsu advantage over Benoit Saint Denis.
items.quote: Paddy Pimblett's got a serious jiu-jitsu advantage over Benoit Saint Denis.
I think that Paddy Pimblett's durability is real.
